creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
This update is to apply xv Japanese Extension patch for old xv ports.
This extension patch supports images in the japanese original 
image format, MAKI, MAG, PIC, Pi, and PIC2.
And this also supports archived image files. Supported archivers
are arc, arj, lzh, tar, tar+compress, tar+gzip, tar+bzip2, zip, 
and zoo.

This xv ports supports PNG format image as well as old ports.

And miscellaneous patches are applied. 
Please see graphics/xv/files/*, after applying this update patch.

To apply this patch:
   $ cd ${PORTSDIR}/graphics
   $ patch < [this mail]
   $ cd xv
   $ rm patches/patch-aa patches/patch-ah

Thanks.

-- shige
